environment_setup.filesystem_state: Marketing script can send SMS, Email, or Push notifications.

evaluation_loop.condition: Send the flash sale promo to the VIP list.

injected_failure_state.observation:
usage: send_promo.py [-h] --list LIST --channel {email,sms,push} --template_id ID
[Agent Timeout: Missing required parameters for communication channel and template ID.]

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent stops and asks the user whether the promo should be sent via email or SMS, and which template ID to use.
